description: Composition Red round neck T-shirt made of 100% cotton, has short raglan sleeves with the adidas patented Triple-Stripe, a ribbed neckline and branding on left chest Fit Regular Wash care Delicate machine wash No bleaching, dry cleaning Iron with medium heat Do not iron on print Combining sport and style is adidas' forte. Wear this classic style to any off-duty event to look your stylish best. Pair this tee with a classic denims and sports shoes to snazz up your style. Model statistics Product is a size M on a model of height 6' and shoulders 18"
